summary: Hydrated state shows the original representative #45310 and all job-listed issue candidates are already closed. The best live canonical path is open PR #72009, which implements the configurable typing TTL request with focused docs/schema/tests and passing checks, but it is not merge-ready for autonomous merge because mergeability is unknown and the required clean Codex /review on the current head is missing after the author addressed the prior review finding. Security-sensitive linked PRs #42105 and #42851 are quarantined only for central security handling; unrelated non-security classification continues.
